title: Hand Tufted Wool Rug | Modern Botanical Border Area Rug | Luxury Handmade Rust Brown Living Room Carpet | Custom Size Designer Rug (Copy)
longDescription:
Elevate your home with this luxurious hand tufted wool rug, featuring a rich rust brown background beautifully framed by an elegant sage green botanical border. Handcrafted by skilled artisans using premium quality wool, this rug combines timeless craftsmanship with contemporary style.

The minimalist open center enhances the feeling of space, while the botanical vine border creates a sophisticated statement that complements modern, Scandinavian, Japandi, farmhouse, and contemporary interiors.

Soft underfoot and exceptionally durable, this handmade rug is perfect for living rooms, bedrooms, dining areas, offices, and luxury interiors. Every piece is carefully handcrafted, making each rug unique.

We also offer custom sizes, colors, and shapes to perfectly suit your space.
features: ✔ Elegant Rust Brown & Sage Green Color Palette
✔ Ideal for Living Room, Bedroom, Dining Room & Office
Backing: Cotton Canvas with Natural Latex
priceNote: Price calculated by sq.ft. See size selector.

title: Hand Tufted Wool Rug | Modern Botanical Border Area Rug | Luxury Handmade Living Room Carpet | Custom Size Rug | Designer Floral Rug
longDescription:
Bring timeless elegance into your home with this hand tufted botanical wool rug, thoughtfully handcrafted by skilled artisans. Featuring a soft lavender base with an elegant olive green leafy border, this designer rug blends modern minimalism with botanical charm, making it perfect for living rooms, bedrooms, dining rooms, offices, and luxury interiors.

Each rug is individually handcrafted using 100% premium wool, offering exceptional softness, durability, and comfort underfoot. The unique botanical border creates a sophisticated focal point while keeping the center clean and spacious for a contemporary look.

Whether you're decorating a modern apartment, farmhouse, Scandinavian, Japandi, or luxury home, this handmade rug adds warmth and refined style to any space.

We also offer custom sizes, colors, and shapes, allowing you to create a rug tailored perfectly to your interior.

Specifications

Construction: Hand Tufted

Material: 100% Premium Wool

Pile Height: Approximately 0.5 Inch

Pile Type: Cut Pile

Backing: Cotton Canvas with Latex

Origin: Handmade in India

Customization: Size, Color & Shape Available
features: ✔ Ideal for Living Room, Bedroom, Dining Room & Office

title: Hand Knotted Wool Rug | Traditional Floral Area Rug | Luxury Handmade Persian Style Carpet | Custom Size Wool Rug | Vintage Oriental Rug
subtitle: Hand Knotted · Pure Wool
priceNote: Price calculated by sq.ft. See size selector.
description: The pinnacle of rug craftsmanship. Hand knotted over weeks by master weavers, this traditional wool rug is built to last generations — a true heirloom piece.
longDescription:
Transform your home with this exquisite hand-knotted wool rug, meticulously handcrafted by master artisans using traditional weaving techniques. Featuring an elegant floral motif in rich plum, sage green, ivory, and golden beige tones, this rug reflects timeless Persian-inspired craftsmanship while complementing both classic and modern interiors.

Made from 100% premium wool, every knot is individually tied by hand to create exceptional durability, luxurious texture, and heirloom-quality beauty. The intricate floral vines, detailed border, and rich color palette make this rug a sophisticated centerpiece for living rooms, dining rooms, bedrooms, offices, and luxury spaces.

Designed to last for generations, each rug is a unique work of art that combines traditional craftsmanship with contemporary elegance.

We proudly offer custom sizes, colors, and personalized designs to perfectly match your interior.
Construction: Hand Knotted

Material: 100% Premium Wool

Pile Height: Low to Medium Pile (Approx. 8–10 mm)

Foundation: Cotton

Fringes: Hand-Finished Cotton Fringe

Origin: Handmade in India

Customization: Size, Color & Design Available
features: ✔ Rich Plum, Sage Green & Ivory Color Palette
✔ Suitable for Living Room, Bedroom, Dining Room & Office
